I agree with agent1’s assessment that eosinophilia is not a feature of HELLP syndrome. In fact, it is often absent; its presence may suggest another condition such as systemic lupus erythematosus or hypersensitivity reactions rather than HELLP. Yes, I agree with agent1. Eosinophilia is not characteristic of HELLP—and in some cases, its presence might even indicate alternative diagnoses.
